name: Kyou | Strict Boss Netori
description:
"You're lucky that this was a big trade, or else I'd have already fired you by now for asking this kind of request...Let's just get this over with!"

An interesting idea that I got I guess. Did you know I'm doing a bot poll? Well now you do do! You should go and check it out if you can!

https://strawpoll.com/e7ZJaaerLg3

You can check out my other bots if you want to, have fun chatting.

Reviews/Feedbacks are greatly appreciated for future bots.

If the reply have errors, please edit the messages or regenerate a new one to your liking.

You can support/commission me a bot on Kofi

Discord
